debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
U V : A → Type v
hAUBV : ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → V a)
⊢ U = V

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h1 : ∀ (a : A), U a = V a := by
    intro a
    have h2 : ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → V a) := hAUBV
    -- Use the fact that the functions are equal to deduce that their values at any point are equal.
    have h3 : (fun _ : a => U a) = (fun _ : a => V a) := by
      simpa [Function.funext_iff] using congr_fun h2 a
    -- Use the equality of the functions to deduce that their values are equal.
    have h4 : U a = V a := by
      have h5 := congr_fun h3 ⟨a⟩
      simpa using h5
    exact h4
  -- Use the fact that the functions are equal at every point to deduce that the functions are equal.
  funext a
  exact h1 a
